de.uka.ilkd.key.util

Class Assert

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.util.Assert

  • public final class Assert
extends java.lang.Object
    Special assert statements intended for use with KeY. Raises AssertionFailure (which is a subtype of Exception) instead of AssertionError.

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Constructor and Description
      Assert() 

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Static Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      static void assertEqualSort(Sorted t1, Sorted t2)
      Check whether two terms (or other sorted objects) are of the same sort.
      static void assertSubSort(Sorted t1, Sorted t2)
      Check whether the sort of t1 is a subsort of the sort of t2.

      • Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

        clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

      • Assert

        public Assert()

    • Method Detail

      • assertEqualSort

        public static void assertEqualSort(Sorted t1,
                                   Sorted t2)
        Check whether two terms (or other sorted objects) are of the same sort.
        Parameters:
        t1 -
        t2 -

      • assertSubSort

        public static void assertSubSort(Sorted t1,
                                 Sorted t2)
        Check whether the sort of t1 is a subsort of the sort of t2. I.e., check whether a substitution of t1 for t2 is legal.
        Parameters:
        t1 -
        t2 -
